title: Reference data
subtitle: Tenant-scoped lookup lists used across the app.
titlesDescription: Honorifics used on user profiles (Mr, Mrs, Dr, etc.).
languagesDescription: Locales available for user-facing UI translation.
organizationTypesDescription: Typology (Department, Office, Unit, …) with hierarchy level.
positionTypesDescription: Post typology (Director, Manager, Officer) with optional hierarchy.
regionalGroupsDescription: AU regional groupings used to classify member states.
memberStatesDescription: AU member states with nationality, abbreviation, and regions.
name: Name
regionsHelp: Assign this member state to one or more AU regional groups.
emptyDescription: Add a reference entry to make it selectable in forms across the tenant.
duplicate: An entry with this code already exists
deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this entry. Forms currently pointing at this code will show it as unknown. Continue?
